name: harness-trajdebug-agent
description: TrajectoryDebug skills for diagnosing terminal-agent traces and running runtime ICL canaries.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose traces and run TD ICL canaries
interface.longDescription: Use Harness-TrajecDebug from Codex to diagnose Harbor and terminal-agent trajectories, select Debug-Action cards, compare no-TD versus with-TD runs, and preserve verifier-aligned evidence.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose this Harbor run with TrajectoryDebug
Build a Debug-Action card for this failed trace
Compare no-TD and with-TD evidence for this task
